nodes.short_description: Contractors Showdown delivers adrenaline-fueled VR combat with two distinct modes: fast-paced Battle Royale and the immersive, tactical Exfil Zone. Customize your loadout, complete missions, and fight to survive in dynamic, high-stakes battles. Gear up, squad up, and dominate the VR battlefield!

nodes.long_description: Contractors Showdown delivers an immersive military-styled VR First-Person Shooter experience. Engage in heart-pounding combat as you, along with 59 other players, navigate a vast and detailed 16 square-kilometer map. The game centers around a thrilling Battle Royale game mode, where strategic prowess and combat skills are paramount.  Gear up for intense battles, dynamic team play, and a visually stunning VR environment that thrusts players into the forefront of military actions.
nodes.short_description: Contractors Showdown delivers an immersive military-styled VR First-Person Shooter experience that centers around a thrilling Battle Royale game mode, where strategic prowess and combat skills are paramount.

nodes.change_log:
v.1.2.1.1
Fixed an issue where junk boxes could potentially duplicate items.
Fixed an issue where the Christmas-themed water bottle could not be refilled.
Attempted to address the fatal error crash issue.

v.1.2.1.0
Christmas Event
Celebrate the holidays with a festive Christmas event!
Christmas Decorations: Enjoy holiday-themed decorations in your Hideout to get into the festive spirit.
Special Mission: Take on a limited-time Christmas mission with unique rewards.
Special Hunting Squad: A challenging hunting squad has appeared in the Dam area—defeat them for exclusive loot!
New Features & Adjustments
Added "Select All" option for the basement vendor interface.
The ammo reloading machine's storage space has been moved to a new table. The original table now cannot store items.
Blind boxes can now be opened and sold directly in the Hideout.
Bug Fixes
Fixed an issue where storage racks had duplicate IDs.
Resolved an issue where mission items could not be submitted.
Fixed duplication bugs for graphics cards and ammunition.
Addressed a crash caused by certain shotguns.
Fixed an issue where laser sights would render the inbox unusable.
Resolved task list refresh issues.
Fixed interaction issues between two junk boxes, where only the box with the higher required item count would be recognized during delivery.
Fixed an issue where items could be grabbed through walls.
Addressed synchronization issues with secret room doors.
Corrected errors in task location descriptions.
Resolved an issue where bombs would occasionally disappear on their own.
Fixed a bug where empty fuel canisters could allow players to gain speed boosts.
Corrected hand texture issues in "Hands Only" mode when picking up and dropping phones.
Fixed a bug where SECA16 rifles would disappear when placed on the ground.
Resolved an issue preventing the installation of scopes after laser sights were installed.
Fixed a bug where uncapped AKs could equip suppressors in incorrect positions.
Resolved collision issues for weapons like the M3A1 when holstered at the waist.
Fixed an issue where purchasing shotgun ammo would result in receiving two sets instead of one.
Balance Changes
Improved the armor protection angle to cover chest areas that previously lacked protection.
Reduced the firing volume of the Sjögren shotgun.
Adjusted the attributes of 5.56x45mm M995 rounds: decreased penetration level and armor damage, increased base damage (to align with the Christmas event's free ammo giveaway).
Fixed an issue where the Rampage OD armor would clip through the ground.
Adjusted shop prices for ammo pouches, helmets, medical syringes, and fuel canisters.
Resolved a bug preventing bombs from being sold.
Miscellaneous Updates
Reduced the grab detection range for limb repair kits.
Increased the drop rate for high-quality weapons.
Decreased the drop rate for blind boxes.

v.1.2.0.2
Fixed a duplicate ID issue with storage racks.
Resolved an issue where mission items could not be submitted.
Fixed the AKM 30-round magazine not being able to fit into pockets.

Patch 1.2.0.1
Prevent body leaning while looking down.
Increased foot step attenuation radius by a little.
Adjust armor body location, so it's easier to grab things when looking down.

ExfilZone Update Patch Notes
New Features:
- Tutorial Area: Added a tutorial area accessible through the main menu.
- Tactical Leaning: Implemented tactical leaning mechanics.
- Backup Supply: Merchants now offer a low-cost, time-limited basic equipment set.
- JOHNNY Merchant: Weekly high-value buybacks for specific items.
- Armor & Helmet Settings: Added a setting to unequip armor and helmets using a combination key.
- Audio Rework: Reworked weapon, footstep, and Metro audio attenuation.
- Default Item Grab Sound: Added a default sound effect for grabbing items.
- Locked Item Info: Clicking on locked items now displays the unlock conditions.
- Performance: Increased Quest 2 performance compared to the Alpha Test version.
New Weapons and Magazines:
- G3SG1 7.62x51 Assault Rifle
- G3SG1 7.62x51 Mag (20-round)
New Headgear:
- LH-250 Pilot Helmet
- Tsh-4M Tank Helmet
New Body Armors:
- 6B2 Body Armor
- Press PACA Body Armor
- Security PACA Body Armor
- Police PACA Body Armor
- 6B17 Body Armor
- 6B17 Upgraded Body Armor
New Backpacks:
- Robinson BFM Backpack
- Odldos Flowers Backpack
- Odldos Black Backpack
Adjustments:
- UI Visibility: Hunger, thirst, and carrying capacity now only display when their status changes.
- Localization: Filled in missing translations for all languages.
- Scavenger Mode: No longer inherits hideout health settings from Contractors mode.
- Hideout Adjustments:
  - Structural changes to Hideout layout.
  - Ammo reloading and armor repair unavailable during power outages.
- Food Interaction:
  - Improved interaction experience.
  - Food disappears after consumption (except refillable bottles).
  - Faster recovery after consuming food.
- Map Changes: Updated BR and EZ MICA maps, adjusted some mini-map location names.
- Audio: Adjusted death sound effects.
- Merchant UI: Improved display in the merchant purchase screen.
- Delivery Kiosk UI: Enhanced Item Delivery Kiosk UI display.
- Ammo Adjustments: Fixed incorrect collisions for 9x19 and .45 ACP bullets.
- Weapon Stats: Added detailed attributes for weapons, ammo, and grenades.
Balancing:
- Hideout Facilities:
  - Adjusted material requirements, prices, and levels.
  - Reduced the quantity of some required materials.
- Experience:
  - Modified overall player experience progression.
  - Adjusted experience required per level.
- Loot Distribution: Rebalanced item distribution for better scavenging.
- Shop Pricing:
  - Adjusted weapon, attachment, and ammo prices.
  - Modified recycling prices for certain items.
- Boss Adjustments:
  - Reduced boss spawn rates (no longer 100%).
  - Tweaked police station boss equipment.
- Item Unlocks:
  - Revised unlock conditions for some items.
  - Adjusted item exchange requirements.
- Weapon Recoil: Reconfigured weapon recoil and attachment bonuses.
- Armor Durability: Slightly reduced bullet damage to armor durability.
Bug Fixes:
- Fixed Scav players spawning together.
- Resolved issues caused by disconnections affecting equipment, missions, and friend lists.
- Fixed duplication of equipment.
- Addressed anomalies with removing items from junk boxes.
- Fixed item refresh issues in the "Sell" interface.
- Resolved truck marking issues in the "Where Did The Trucks Go" mission.
- Fixed grenades colliding with UI and causing nearby explosions.
- Corrected issues with unsellable items.
- Fixed Sjogren shotgun slug spread behavior.
- Resolved red dot sights' zeroing issues.
- Adjusted PKP sight positioning with rail attachments.
- Fixed overlapping items in ammo pouches and painkillers.
- Addressed issues with storing and stacking certain items.
- Corrected misspelled letters on the server room door sign.
- Fixed hand texture issues in Hand-Only mode.
- Resolved spacing inconsistencies between certain armor and holsters.
- Fixed clipping issues with equipment worn by certain bots.
- Addressed collision bugs with specific attachments in BR mode.
Map Adjustments:
- Resolved visual clipping issues across the map.
- Fixed a bug causing players to get stuck near the Motel windows.
- Addressed an issue where players could get trapped in rock crevices above the northern tunnel at the mall.
- Corrected a clipping issue at the underground extraction point near the black market.
Environment Fixes:
- Fixed overly bright glass railings in the mall.
- Resolved obstruction issues on the second-floor staircase of the office building near the motel.
- Fixed a bug where players could get stuck after jumping off the cliff north of the dam.
- Addressed an issue with players getting trapped on the outer wall fence of the police station in Hyder Town.
Postponed Feature
Custom Lobby for Battle Royale Mode:
The custom lobby feature for Battle Royale mode has been postponed to allow us to refine and optimize its functionality. We are working hard to make it available as soon as possible.
